---
title: "Calendar"
---

::: {.page-content}
The calendar below shows Aikido events in the Wisconsin area, including
seminars, gasshuku, and open mat sessions hosted by dojos across the
Capital Aikido Federation. Click any event for details.

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="https://calendar.google.com/calendar/embed?src=c_ed4c80ef059f8ee2ac0ba90e2fcab9cfc815431d57de06964501c24c13acccce%40group.calendar.google.com&ctz=America%2FChicago"
  style="border: 0"
  width="100%"
  height="640"
  frameborder="0"
  scrolling="no">
</iframe>
```
:::
